auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Blocknative API key sent with the Authorization header. Request or manage it from the official Blocknative API key page: https://www.blocknative.com/request-api-key

actions.name: get_gas_price_distribution
actions.description: Get the current Blocknative gas-price distribution for Ethereum mainnet.

chainId.description: The supported chain ID for gas distribution. Only Ethereum mainnet (`1`) works.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for requesting the Blocknative gas-price distribution.

system.description: The chain ecosystem returned by Blocknative.

network.description: The network name returned by Blocknative.

unit.description: The gas-price unit returned by Blocknative.

maxPrice.description: The highest priced transaction returned by Blocknative.

currentBlockNumber.description: The current block number used for the distribution snapshot.

msSinceLastBlock.description: Milliseconds since the last block at the distribution snapshot.

prefixItems.description: The number of transactions in this price bucket.

items.description: One `[price, count]` pair returned by Blocknative.

distribution.description: The ordered gas-price distribution buckets returned by Blocknative.

n.description: The top-N pending transactions covered by the distribution.

topNDistribution.description: The normalized top-N gas-price distribution returned by Blocknative.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the Blocknative gas-price distribution.

actions.name: get_gas_prices
actions.description: Get Blocknative gas-price estimates for the default chain or a selected network.

chainId.description: The chain ID to query. Use `0` for Bitcoin when querying the Gas Price API.

system.description: The chain ecosystem used by Blocknative, for example `ethereum` or `story`.

network.description: The network name used by Blocknative, for example `main` or `mainnet`.

items.description: One requested confidence level for gas-price prediction.

confidenceLevels.description: Up to five confidence levels used to override the default prediction buckets.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for requesting Blocknative gas-price estimates.

system.description: The chain ecosystem returned by Blocknative.

network.description: The network name returned by Blocknative.

unit.description: The gas-price unit returned by Blocknative.

maxPrice.description: The highest priced transaction returned by Blocknative.

currentBlockNumber.description: The current block number used for the prediction snapshot.

msSinceLastBlock.description: Milliseconds since the last block at the prediction snapshot.

blockNumber.description: The block number this prediction targets.

estimatedTransactionCount.description: The estimated number of transactions in the predicted block.

baseFeePerGas.description: The base fee per gas returned by Blocknative.

blobBaseFeePerGas.description: The blob base fee per gas returned by Blocknative when present.

confidence.description: The inclusion confidence for this gas-price bucket.

price.description: The gas price returned for this confidence bucket.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: The max priority fee per gas returned for this confidence bucket.

maxFeePerGas.description: The max fee per gas returned for this confidence bucket.

estimatedPrices.description: The ordered gas-price estimates returned for the block.

items.description: One predicted block-price object returned by Blocknative.

blockPrices.description: The predicted block-price payloads returned by Blocknative.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for Blocknative gas-price estimates.

actions.name: list_gas_oracles
actions.description: List the gas-oracle metadata exposed by Blocknative across supported chains.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Blocknative gas oracles.

arch.description: The blockchain architecture returned by Blocknative.

chainId.description: The unique chain ID returned by Blocknative.

label.description: The human-readable chain label returned by Blocknative.

name.description: The internal chain name returned by Blocknative.

network.description: The network name returned by Blocknative.

system.description: The chain ecosystem returned by Blocknative.

addressByVersion.description: The gas-oracle contract addresses keyed by Blocknative oracle version.

rpcUrl.description: The public RPC URL returned by Blocknative.

blockExplorerUrl.description: The public block-explorer URL returned by Blocknative.

icon.description: The chain icon URL returned by Blocknative.

testnet.description: Whether the returned oracle belongs to a testnet.

items.description: One gas-oracle metadata object returned by Blocknative.

oracles.description: The gas oracles returned by Blocknative.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing Blocknative gas oracles.

actions.name: list_supported_chains
actions.description: List the chains currently supported by the Blocknative Gas Platform.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Blocknative supported chains.

arch.description: The blockchain architecture returned by Blocknative.

chainId.description: The unique chain ID returned by Blocknative.

label.description: The human-readable chain label returned by Blocknative.

items.description: One feature flag supported on the chain.

features.description: The Blocknative features supported for the returned chain.

icon.description: The chain icon URL returned by Blocknative.

system.description: The chain ecosystem returned by Blocknative.

network.description: The network name returned by Blocknative.

items.description: One supported chain returned by Blocknative.

chains.description: The supported chains returned by Blocknative.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing Blocknative supported chains.
